closeout_headroom_rationale: adaptive diagnostic controllers may use more measurement actions than the 12/11-event fixed recipes; all methods share the same ceiling and runs stop at the complete-experiment limit

excluded_methods.ppo_diagnostic: legacy failed-smoke checkpoint rejected by the current observation-contract hash

feedback_intervention_contract.permutation_source: same-agent IID phase measurement packets, cyclically shifted within instrument
feedback_intervention_contract.delay: one previous measurement event of the same instrument
feedback_intervention_contract.critical_measurement_deletion: mask the configured process-diagnostic instrument but retain final assay scoring

analysis.iid_performance: mean terminal score over the two pre-change experiments
analysis.adaptation_performance: mean terminal score over the two post-change experiments
analysis.mechanism_identification: final candidate argmax and probability assigned to truth
analysis.uncertainty_calibration: multiclass Brier score on final mechanism belief
analysis.information_value: declared expected information gain versus next-step normalized entropy reduction

claim_boundary: exploratory diagnostics rather than a formal leaderboard
PPO uses an ineligible failed-smoke checkpoint
no model training or weight updates are performed
material counterfactuals are environment interventions rather than real-material claims
